1.description: Resolve Drammen municipality to kommunenummer and boundary geometry

2.description: Fetch buildings in Drammen municipality (filtered by kommunenummer)

6.description: Compute distance from each building to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: Sort buildings by distance to quick-clay hazard zone ascending

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.

Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Flood zone data showing inundation areas for specific flood return periods such as 20-year, 200-year, and 1000-year flood scenarios. Useful for scenario-based flood analysis and flood-risk filtering.

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, omrade AS municipality_geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningid, representasjonspunkt AS building_geometry FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [flomsoner]
SELECT omrade AS flood_zone_geometry FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "building_geometry"
-- right_geom: "flood_zone_geometry"

1.description: Resolve Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

6.description: Compute distance from flood-intersecting buildings to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: Sort buildings by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.

Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Flood zone data showing inundation areas for specific flood return periods such as 20-year, 200-year, and 1000-year flood scenarios. Useful for scenario-based flood analysis and flood-risk filtering.

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, omrade AS municipality_geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [flomsoner]
SELECT omrade AS flood_zone_geometry FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, omrade AS municipality_geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Drammen%'

2.sql: SELECT bygningid, representasjonspunkt AS building_geometry FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '3301'

1.description: resolve Drammen municipality name to kommunenummer and boundary geometry

2.description: fetch buildings in Drammen municipality by kommunenummer

6.description: compute distance from each flood-intersecting building to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: sort buildings by distance to nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.
Flood hazard susceptibility data showing areas with potential flood risk. Suitable for first-pass flood exposure analysis, municipality-level planning, and spatial overlay with buildings and parcels.

Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Flood zone data showing inundation areas for specific flood return periods such as 20-year, 200-year, and 1000-year flood scenarios. Useful for scenario-based flood analysis and flood-risk filtering.
